name: documents_v2
notes: Full list load: SELECT * FROM documents_v2 ORDER BY uploaded_at DESC (GET /api/documents). Search load: SELECT * FROM documents_v2 WHERE name ILIKE $1 ORDER BY uploaded_at DESC (GET /api/search?q=). In both cases all columns are returned and the client uses them all for display.

tags column (TEXT[]) may be null for documents inserted via the trg_sync_to_v2 trigger because that trigger deliberately omits tags from the INSERT into documents_v2 (see migration 003-create-trigger.sql). The panel handles this by checking doc.tags && doc.tags.length > 0 before rendering tag pills.
